author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 600734e3. Added ShardingStrategy enum (FullShard/ShardGradOp/NoShard), new_with_strategy constructor, dispatch in forward/sync_gradients, and broadcast_updated_params re-sync hook for ZeRO-2. 5 new tests covering ShardGradOp and NoShard paths; all 13 fsdp tests + 81 distributed crate tests pass.
